ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_date" TEXT /* Date of the stop */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Time of the stop */,
  "stop_location" TEXT /* Location of the stop */,
  "stop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stop */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who made the stop */,
  "vehicle_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search */,
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the duration */,
  "drugs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drugs related stop */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrest */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "drugs_related_stop" INTEGER /* Whether the stop was related to drugs */,
  "is_arrested" INTEGER /* Whether the driver was arrested */,
  "stop_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES search_conducted ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_duration_id FOREIGN KEY ("duration_id") REFERENCES stop_durations ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_drugs_id FOREIGN KEY ("drugs_id") REFERENCES drugs_related_stops ("drugs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES stop_outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_age_raw" INTEGER /* Raw age of the driver */,
  "driver_age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "driver_race" TEXT /* Race of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_state" TEXT /* State where the driver's license was issued */,
  "driver_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the driver's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "violation_raw" TEXT /* Raw violation description */,
  "violation" TEXT /* Violation description */,
  "violation_code" TEXT /* Code for the violation */,
  "violation_fine" TEXT /* Fine amount for the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "stop_outcome" TEXT /* Description of the stop outcome */,
  "outcome_code" TEXT /* Code for the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_conducted" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search conducted */,
  "search_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the search */,
  "search_result" TEXT /* Result of the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration */,
  "stop_duration" TEXT /* Description of the stop duration */,
  "duration_code" TEXT /* Code for the duration */,
  "duration_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs_related_stops" (
  "drugs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drugs related stop */,
  "drugs_related_stop" INTEGER /* Whether the stop was related to drugs */,
  "drugs_found" INTEGER /* Whether drugs were found during the stop */,
  "drugs_type" TEXT /* Type of drugs found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drugs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "is_arrested" INTEGER /* Whether the driver was arrested */,
  "arrest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the arrest */,
  "arrest_charges" TEXT /* Charges filed against the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "officer_badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome */,
  "search_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search */,
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the duration */,
  "drugs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drugs related stop */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrest */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of history record */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_drugs_id FOREIGN KEY ("drugs_id") REFERENCES drugs_related_stops ("drugs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_search_id FOREIGN KEY ("search_id") REFERENCES search_conducted ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES stop_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_history_duration_id FOREIGN KEY ("duration_id") REFERENCES stop_durations ("duration_id")
)
column_names: ID of the officer who made the stop
Number of passengers in the vehicle
ID of the drugs related stop
Whether the stop was related to drugs
State where the driver's license was issued
Zip code of the driver's address
Unique identifier for each drugs related stop
Whether the stop was related to drugs
Whether drugs were found during the stop
Unique identifier for each history record
ID of the drugs related stop
Detailed description of the history record
